case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. VIOLETA B REYNA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT REYNA, VIOLETA B DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-28-2009
